from source import bitcount

def test_bitcount_nonzero_multi_bit():
    """Test with a number that has multiple 1-bits (127 = 0b1111111).
    Buggy code uses XOR instead of AND, causing an infinite loop.
    This test will time out or never complete on the buggy version.
    """
    result = bitcount(127)
    assert result == 7, f"Expected 7 one-bits in 127, got {result}"
